copiedToClipboard.comment: Snackbar message after copying a key to clipboard

copyFailed.comment: Snackbar error message when clipboard copy fails

resourceDeleted.comment: Snackbar message after successfully deleting a resource

deleteFailed.comment: Snackbar error message when resource deletion fails
deleteFailed.es: No se pudo eliminar el recurso
deleteFailed.fr-ca: Échec de la suppression de la ressource

translateFailed.comment: Snackbar error message when auto-translation fails
translateFailed.es: No se pudo traducir automáticamente el recurso
translateFailed.fr-ca: Échec de la traduction automatique de la ressource

translationUpdated.comment: Snackbar message after successfully updating a translation
translationUpdated.fr-ca: Traduction mise à jour avec succès

localeTranslated.comment: Snackbar message when exactly 1 locale was auto-translated

localesTranslatedX.comment: Snackbar message when multiple locales were auto-translated
localesTranslatedX.fr-ca: {count} Les paramètres régionaux ont été traduits avec succès

allLocalesUpToDate.source: All locales are already up to date
allLocalesUpToDate.comment: Snackbar message when auto-translate finds nothing to update
allLocalesUpToDate.es: Todas las configuraciones regionales ya están actualizadas
allLocalesUpToDate.fr-ca: Tous les emplacements sont déjà à jour.

skippedLocalesX.comment: Snackbar warning when some locales were skipped because they use ICU format

resourceCreated.comment: Snackbar message after successfully creating a new resource

autoTranslationSkippedX.source: Auto-translation skipped for {locales} (ICU format not supported)
autoTranslationSkippedX.comment: Snackbar warning when auto-translation was skipped for some locales due to ICU format
autoTranslationSkippedX.es: Se omitió la traducción automática para {locales} (formato ICU no compatible)
autoTranslationSkippedX.fr-ca: Traduction automatique ignorée pour {locales} (format ICU non pris en charge)

resourceAlreadyInFolder.source: Resource is already in this folder
resourceAlreadyInFolder.comment: Snackbar message when user drops a resource onto its current folder
resourceAlreadyInFolder.es: El recurso ya está en esta carpeta
resourceAlreadyInFolder.fr-ca: La ressource se trouve déjà dans ce dossier.

resourceMovedX.comment: Snackbar message after moving a resource to a different folder

folderAlreadyAtLocation.source: Folder is already at this location
folderAlreadyAtLocation.comment: Snackbar message when user drops a folder onto its current parent location
folderAlreadyAtLocation.es: La carpeta ya está en esta ubicación
folderAlreadyAtLocation.fr-ca: Le dossier est déjà à cet emplacement.

folderMovedX.comment: Snackbar message after successfully moving a folder

moveResourceFailed.comment: Snackbar error message when moving a resource fails
moveResourceFailed.es: No se pudo mover el recurso
moveResourceFailed.fr-ca: Échec du déplacement de la ressource

moveFolderFailed.comment: Snackbar error message when moving a folder fails
moveFolderFailed.es: No se pudo mover la carpeta
